name: molcell-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at Molecular Cell (Cell Press), the flagship journal for mechanistic molecular biology.

plugins.name: molcell-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Molecular Cell manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, mechanism/scope fit, single-mechanism framing, main-text writing within the ~7,000-word budget, display items, STAR Methods + Key Resources Table, data/code availability, the Highlights + eTOC + Graphical Abstract trio, the Summary, Cell Press numbered references, submission preflight + cover letter, and reviewer rebuttal.
